# Efficient Memory Usage


$$\begin{array}{llll}
\text{Recursion}&&\text{No Dynamic Programming (No Memoization or Tabulation)}\\
\text{Top Down}&&\text{Dynamic Programming (Memoization)}\\
\text{Bottom Up}&&\text{Dynamic Programming (Tabulation)}
\end{array}$$


$$
a_n=a_{n-1}+a_{n-2}
$$
where
$$
a_0=0,\quad a_1=1
$$


```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import time
```


```python
def fib(n):
    if n <= 1:
        return n
    a = 0
    b = 1
    for _ in range(2, n+1):
        c = a + b
        a, b = b, c
    return c
```


```python
print(fib(10000))
```

**Output:**
```

```


```python
time_record = []
for i in range(1000):
    tic = time.time()
    fib(i+1)
    toc = time.time()
    time_record.append(toc-tic)
    
plt.plot(time_record);
```

**Output:**
```
<Figure size 432x288 with 1 Axes>
```
